description_long: This is a modern desk with a rectangular wooden work surface and a raised back panel that extends along the length of the desk, providing a partial enclosure on three sides. The desk features a two-tone design, with the main surface and one leg in a natural wood finish, while the back panel and the other leg are finished in a smooth white material. The legs are angled outward, giving the desk a contemporary and stable appearance, and one leg is black, contrasting with the rest. There is a shallow shelf integrated into the back panel, divided into compartments for organizing small items or cables, and a small cutout for cable management. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for both professional and home environments. The desk's clean lines and minimalist aesthetic make it ideal for urban interiors.
description: A modern, two-tone desk with a wooden surface, white back panel, and angled legs, featuring an integrated shelf and cable management cutout. Its sleek, minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden surface, white back panel, and the angled black and wood legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the work surface, integrated shelf with compartments, and cable management cutout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the desk's depth and leg design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the white back panel and the two-tone legs.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the integrated shelf and cable cutout, while the back is defined by the continuous white panel; the angled legs provide stability on either side.
